steps.title: Identify what distinguishes the exhibition
steps.content: The underlined claim asserts that Reckoning and Resilience stands apart because of “the breadth of disciplines” — that it encompasses multiple different types of art.

steps.title: Verify the breadth claim
steps.content: B directly proves this by showing the three named artists represent different disciplines: a painter, a photographer, and a sculptor. This evidence demonstrates the breadth the claim asserts. A and C are unrelated (ownership and general museum collection), and D only describes the previous exhibition's narrow focus without proving the breadth exists in Reckoning and Resilience. That matches choice B — B is correct.
